title: Live stock-Claude-Code proof driver + ancillary inventory

tests.cmd: node api/tests/e2e/gateway-claude-code.e2e.mjs (live, health-gated) + npm run gate:ledger (census)
tests.summary: S6 LIVE GATE PASS live (mint + empty-ruleset byte-identical + heartbeat framing + count_tokens + OWNER tokensUsed grew); node --check clean; census 24/24 drivers; driver reports awaiting OPERATOR-RUN (no false green)

typecheck.summary: clean (S6 is a .mjs driver + docs; no TS change)

securityWall.summary: clean (run-level wall green; S6 adds a test driver + docs; no secret in the driver - key never printed)

evidence: reviewer ran the driver LIVE end-to-end 3 times across 3 rounds (its own claude CLI + credential), traced every counter, semantic-diffed the ledger, checked shared/billing schema
verdict trail: needs-work(f7be80f F1-blocking+F2) -> needs-work(df3d4c6, F3 only) -> approve(ab238ae)
findings: [F1 BLOCKING, FIXED df3d4c6] ledgered at G12 -> a DUE artifact that books green on a bare exit-0 skip (the repo's documented false-green trap) -> retargeted to OPERATOR-RUN (awaiting, never a false green)
[F2, FIXED df3d4c6] docblock claimed a --continue multi-turn beat that did not exist
[F3 HIGH, FIXED ab238ae] billing proved 'gateway-client grew platform-wide' not 'on the key owner' (/breakdown has no owner field) -> now reads the OWNER's own admin/usage row and asserts it grew
[F4-F7 rode along: percentage-sum, empty-ruleset precondition assert, ping-guard]
[High, FIXED df3d4c6] overbroad tolerate could swallow a non-rate-limit upstream error -> only 429/rate_limit_error
[High, FIXED df3d4c6] billing proof was skippable while the gate passed -> hard assert (then F3-refined to the owner row)
[Medium, FIXED df3d4c6] cleanup not guaranteed on throw -> try/finally
[Low, FIXED df3d4c6] known-limitation could print as OK -> distinct known() channel

video.evidence: asciinema of the live driver run against a real stock claude CLI: key mint, empty-ruleset (deny-list purged first) byte-identical file round trip, deny-listed KNOWN LIMITATION (honest, distinct from OK), heartbeat ping-before-replay + in-stream rate_limit_error path proven live, count_tokens real counts, the key OWNER's own tokensUsed grew (owner attribution). Independently reproduced by the fresh reviewer 3x.

notes: The dual review caught a real false-green ledger trap (F1) + a five-times-repeated attribution overclaim (F3) - both closed; the fresh reviewer ran the driver live 3x.
The deny-listed multi-tool round trip is a documented OPEN finding (gateway-anon-tooluse-fidelity), recorded as an honest known-limitation - a top LANDING item for a follow-up run.
adversarialTest: api slice, covered by the batched run-level pass (the driver IS an independent live functional exercise).
